title: MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)

jsonLd.title: MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Srinagar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd:
MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd!
